name: Relais Group Oyj
summary: Relais Group Oyj imports and wholesales vehicle electrical equipment and spare parts in the Nordic and Baltic countries. The company offers electrical equipment and spare parts for cars and commercial vehicles under the Startax brand name; batteries, warning lights, and lighting and camera systems for vehicles, boats, and industrial applications under the Awimex brand name; spare parts for passenger cars and light commercial vehicles under the ABR brand name; and spare parts, components, and accessories for busses, trucks, trailers, and construction machinery under the Huzells brand name. It also provides auxiliary and working lights, power management systems, and automotive camera systems for light commercial vehicles under the SEC name; and spare parts and equipment for heavy duty vehicles under the TD Tunga Delar name. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Vantaa, Finland.
